name: Tuna and Avocado Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cans tuna (6 oz each, in water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the hard-boiled eggs and mash them well with a dinner fork.
2. Peel the avocado and squeeze half a lemon on it to prevent discoloration. Mash thoroughly.
3. Mix the mashed avocado and eggs together.
4. Drain the water from the tuna cans and mix with chopped onions, dill relish, salt, fresh lemon juice, Louisiana hot sauce, and mayo.
5. Serve over lettuce.
